questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Macquarie Asset Management and/or any of the other direct or indirect co-investors in the Acquisition and/or Qube.

Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, at the Port of Newcastle or elsewhere in Australia where Qube operates, including as a result of any minority interest in Qube that will be acquired by any of the investors.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.

questions.section: Questions for stakeholders at the Port of Newcastle
questions.text: Identify alternative suppliers of bulk/breakbulk/general stevedoring services at the Port of Newcastle where Qube operates and explain how their service offering could be affected if Macquarie Asset Management and its co- investors own Qube. Please provide examples where possible.

questions.section: Questions for stakeholders at the Port of Newcastle
questions.text: Identify alternative suppliers of grain export terminal services at the Port of Newcastle and explain how their service offering could be affected if Macquarie Asset Management and its co-investors own Qube. Please provide examples where possible.

questions.section: Questions for stakeholders at the Port of Newcastle
questions.text: Identify alternative suppliers of rail haulage services at the Port of Newcastle and explain how their service offering could be affected if Macquarie Asset Management and its co-investors own Qube. Please provide examples where possible.

questions.section: Questions for stakeholders at the Port of Newcastle
questions.text: Please provide examples of any commercially sensitive information regarding Qube’s competitors that the Port of Newcastle can access, and explain how Qube’s access to that information because of Macquarie Asset Management having a controlling interest in Qube could harm those competitors or benefit Qube’s business at the Port of Newcastle.
